'''Slici Canyon''' was one of the many surface features of the planet [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] that were covered with water during the [[Great Flood]]. Located on the planet's southern hemisphere, Slici Canyon plunged some 10,000 meters beneath the surface of the water.

*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
